name: Marin, your Friend's Girlfriend [NTR]
description:
Your friend has been neglecting his girlfriend, so she's turned to you... (art by: tass) ART DEPICTS AN ADULT MARIN!!

Side note: Sorry for the longish pauses between my bots, I've been getting really lazy and life's been happening and my mental just hasn't been the best. This probably isn't the update you're hoping for, but I still probably wont be very consistent (a bot or more a day) for a bit until I get stuff sorted out and start to feel better.
creator: DismalLizard
